_comment: Scored eval scenarios for the brief verifier. Each scenario has an evidence corpus (simulated raw tool outputs), a draft containing a mix of supported and PLANTED false claims, and per-claim checks. 'keywords' identify the claim among the verifier's extracted claims (case-insensitive substring, any match). 'anchor' is a distinctive phrase from the draft used to check whether the claim survived into the revised brief.

scenarios.name: injuries_and_availability
evidence: ESPN news, 1 Jul: Ousmane Dembele ruled out of the remainder of the tournament with a hamstring injury sustained in training.
Squad: France (Coach: Zinedine Zidane) - Goalkeeper: Mike Maignan; Defence: Ibrahima Konate, Theo Hernandez; Offence: Kylian Mbappe, Marcus Thuram. (football-data.org)
Team news search result: France manager confirmed on Thursday that Theo Hernandez trained fully and is available for selection.
scenarios.draft:
## France
France are without Ousmane Dembele, ruled out of the tournament with a hamstring injury (ESPN). Theo Hernandez trained fully and is available. Kylian Mbappe is suspended for this match after two yellow cards. Goalkeeper Mike Maignan is also a doubt with a wrist problem.

scenarios.name: scores_and_results
evidence: Match results (football-data.org): 28 Jun - Argentina 2-0 Mexico; 1 Jul - Argentina 3-1 Netherlands (Round of 32); 24 Jun - Argentina 1-1 Chile.
Standings, Group F: 1. Argentina 7 pts (+5 GD), 2. Mexico 4 pts, 3. Chile 3 pts, 4. Denmark 1 pt.
scenarios.draft:
## Argentina
Argentina topped Group F with 7 points and a +5 goal difference. They beat the Netherlands 3-1 in the Round of 32. Lionel Messi scored a hat-trick in that win. Argentina have kept four consecutive clean sheets coming into this match.

scenarios.name: conditions_and_venue
evidence:
Weather for Kansas City on 2026-07-11:
Condition: Thunderstorm
Temperature: 74°F - 91°F
Precipitation chance: 65%
Venue search result: Arrowhead Stadium in Kansas City is an open-air venue with a natural grass surface installed for the World Cup, capacity roughly 76,000.
scenarios.draft:
## Conditions
The quarter-final is at Arrowhead Stadium, Kansas City, an open-air venue holding roughly 76,000. Thunderstorms are forecast with a 65% chance of precipitation and highs of 91°F. The stadium's retractable roof will be closed if storms arrive. Kickoff is 20:00 UTC, which is mid-afternoon locally. The referee will be Szymon Marciniak of Poland.

scenarios.name: history_and_matchup
evidence: Head-to-head search result (Sports Mole): England and Spain have met 27 times; England 14 wins, Spain 10, 3 draws. Most recent competitive meeting: Euro 2024 final, Spain 2-1 England.
Analysis search result (The Athletic): Spain dominate possession under their current system, averaging 68% in this tournament; England have been more direct, creating most chances from set pieces.
scenarios.draft:
## The Matchup
England and Spain have met 27 times, with England ahead 14 wins to 10 (Sports Mole). Spain won their most recent competitive meeting, the Euro 2024 final, 2-1. Spain average 68% possession in this tournament (The Athletic). England have won the last three meetings between the sides. Spain have never lost a World Cup knockout match in normal time.
